CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, created_date DATE);
SELECT id, created_date FROM test_dates WHERE created_date = makeDate(2023, 2, 28);
SELECT id, created_date FROM test_dates WHERE created_date = makeDate(2023, 366) OR created_date = makeDate(2024, 1, 1);
CREATE TABLE other_dates (event_id INT, event_date DATE);
SELECT t.id, t.created_date, e.event_date FROM test_dates AS t JOIN other_dates AS e ON t.id = e.event_id;
SELECT id, makeDate(2023, day_of_year) AS date_of_year FROM (SELECT day_of_year FROM (SELECT 1 AS day_of_year UNION ALL SELECT 365)) AS days;
